const debounce = (fn, delay) => { let timer; return (...args) => { clearTimeout(timer); timer = setTimeout(() => fn(...args), delay); }; };
interface Props { title: string; onClick: () => void; disabled?: boolean; }
const sortByKey = (arr, key) => [...arr].sort((a, b) => a[key] - b[key]);

async function* paginate(url) { let page = 1; while (true) yield await fetch(`${url}?page=${page++}`); }

def bubble_sort(arr): n = len(arr); for i in range(n): for j in range(0, n-i-1): if arr[j] > arr[j+1]: arr[j], arr[j+1] = arr[j+1], arr[j]
import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_csv('data.csv'); print(df.groupby('category').mean());
def calculate_fibonacci(n): a, b = 0, 1; for _ in range(n): a, b = b, a + b; return a

aesops-fables: Once upon a time, a fox was walking through the forest when he spotted a beautiful bunch of grapes hanging from a vine. The grapes looked ripe and juicy, and the fox's mouth began to water. He jumped and jumped, trying to reach them, but they were just too high. Finally, exhausted, he walked away saying, 'Those grapes are probably sour anyway.' This tale teaches us that it is easy to despise what you cannot have.

A grasshopper spent the warm months singing while the ants worked hard storing food. When winter came, the hungry grasshopper begged for food, but the ants said he should have planned ahead. The moral reminds us to prepare for times of need.

A tortoise and a hare decided to race. The hare, confident in his speed, took a nap. Meanwhile, the slow and steady tortoise kept moving forward and won the race. Persistence and consistency can overcome natural talent when that talent becomes complacent.
baseball-rules: Baseball is played between two teams of nine players each. The game consists of nine innings, with each team batting and fielding in each inning. The batting team tries to score runs by hitting the ball and running around four bases arranged in a diamond shape. The fielding team tries to prevent runs by catching the ball or tagging runners out.

A batter gets three strikes before being called out. Four balls result in a walk to first base. The pitcher throws from the mound sixty feet and six inches from home plate. A home run occurs when the ball is hit over the outfield fence in fair territory.

The defensive positions include pitcher, catcher, first baseman, second baseman, third baseman, shortstop, and three outfielders. Each position requires specific skills and plays a vital role in preventing runs from scoring.
space-cowboys: In the distant future, space cowboys roamed the galaxy in search of adventure and fortune. Their ships were fast, their aim was true, and their courage was legendary. They protected frontier colonies from space pirates and helped settlers establish new homes among the stars.

Captain Maria Cruz piloted her ship through the asteroid belt, dodging debris with practiced ease. Her crew of space cowboys had a reputation for taking the jobs no one else would touch. This mission to rescue colonists from a dying outpost was no different.

The dusty cantina on Mars Station Seven served as a meeting place for space cowboys between missions. Here, legends were born and stories were shared about daring rescues and impossible escapes across the cosmos.
wizard-of-oz: Dorothy lived in Kansas with her Uncle Henry and Aunt Em. One day, a cyclone struck the farmhouse and carried Dorothy and her dog Toto far away to a magical land. When the house landed, it fell upon the Wicked Witch of the East, and Dorothy found herself in a strange and wonderful place.

Following the yellow brick road, Dorothy met the Scarecrow who wanted a brain, the Tin Man who wanted a heart, and the Cowardly Lion who wanted courage. Together they journeyed to the Emerald City to meet the great and powerful Wizard of Oz.

The Wizard turned out to be an ordinary man behind a curtain, but he taught Dorothy and her friends that what they sought was within them all along. Dorothy clicked her ruby slippers three times and returned home to Kansas.

The only thing we have to fear is fear itself.

It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.

paragraphs: Learning to type efficiently is one of the most valuable skills you can develop in today's digital world. With practice and dedication, anyone can improve their typing speed and accuracy significantly.
The modern keyboard layout was designed in the 1870s and has remained largely unchanged since then. Understanding the key positions helps develop muscle memory for faster typing.
Touch typing involves using all ten fingers without looking at the keyboard. This technique allows typists to focus on the content they are creating rather than the mechanics of typing.
Regular practice sessions of fifteen to thirty minutes daily can lead to remarkable improvements in typing proficiency within just a few weeks of consistent effort.
